headline: Dow (DOW) Stock Could Be A Bargain On Cash Flow And Sales
summary: Dow stock is coming off a mixed run, with the share price still down over the last five years, yet the company now screens as undervalued on both its Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and market multiples. At the same time, a strong value score suggests the current price may not fully reflect the cash flows implied by these models. Over the last five years, Dow has delivered a cumulative return of about 36% in decline, which puts the current valuation in the context of a...
